title: Remedies
chapterTitle: Bill of Rights, Freedoms and Responsibilities

content.text: A court may grant such relief or remedy, or may make such order, in respect of any contravention or threatened contravention of this Part as it considers just and appropriate.
Damages shall be awarded only where a court is satisfied that the award is necessary to afford just and effective relief.

notes: Courts may grant just and appropriate remedies.
